summary: Completed testing of Real-time Error Monitoring feature in Agent Control Center. Backend: 28/29 tests passed (96.5%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - Live Errors tab with 5-second polling, Report Error dialog, Error Details dialog, severity classification, stats cards, Pause/Resume toggle all functional.

minor.issue: TypeError severity detection returns 'low' instead of 'medium' - minor inconsistency in severity logic

critical_code_review_comments: Live error monitoring polling interval is 5 seconds as specified
Browser push notification permission is requested on page load
Critical errors show browser notifications when permission granted
Error severity is auto-detected: critical (crash/fatal), high (500/timeout), medium (404/syntax), low (default)
Error categories include: javascript, react, python, database, syntax, runtime, performance, unknown
Stats cards show: Total, Critical, High, Fixed, Fix Rate
Live Errors tab shows badge with critical error count in tab header
seed_data_creation: Multiple test errors created via pytest for testing severity detection and category routing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time Error Monitoring feature is fully functional. Navigate to Agent Control Center > Live Errors tab. Stats show: Total=20, Critical=3, High=3, Fixed=3, Fix Rate=15%. The error feed polls every 5 seconds when 'Live Monitoring Active' is enabled. Report Error dialog allows manual error submission with auto-routing to agents.

Backend API - GET /api/orchestrator/live.details: Returns errors array with stats (total, fixed, failed, pending, critical, high, fix_rate)

Backend API - POST /api/orchestrator/rep.details: Creates error with auto-detected severity and category, routes to agents when auto_route=true

Backend API - PUT /api/orchestrator/live.details: Marks error as fixed with custom resolution text and resolved_at timestamp

Backend API - GET /api/orchestrator/erro.details: Returns timeline data for charting with configurable hours parameter

Backend API - GET /api/orchestrator/live.details: Returns specific error details, 404 for non-existent errors

Frontend - Live Errors tab.details: Tab shows in Agent Control Center with badge showing critical count

Frontend - Live Monitoring Active indica.details: Shows 'Live Monitoring Active' with Pause button, toggles to 'Resume'

Frontend - Stats cards.details: Shows Total (1h), Critical, High, Fixed, Fix Rate cards with correct values

Frontend - Report Error dialog.details: Opens with Error Type, Error Message (required), File Path, Stack Trace fields and Report & Auto-Fix button

Frontend - Error Details dialog.details: Shows full error info with severity, category, status badges and Mark as Resolved button

Frontend - Error Feed.details: Displays errors with severity color coding, category badges, status indicators, file paths

Frontend - 5-second polling.details: Live error feed polls every 5 seconds when monitoring is active
